Bash(git commit -m "feat: Add distributed orchestration scripts

Core scripts for distributed agent execution system:

Orchestration Scripts:
- distributed-orchestrator.sh - Create/manage tmux sessions
- session-manager.sh - List, kill, broadcast to sessions  
- consolidate-reports.sh - Collect and merge agent reports

Distributed Utilities:
- session-coordinator.sh - High-level coordination logic
- session-sync.sh - Context synchronization across sessions

Features:
- Creates isolated tmux sessions for each agent
- Manages message queue \(pending/processing/completed\)
- Handles report generation and consolidation
- Provides broadcast messaging to all agents
- Includes color-coded logging and error handling

These scripts enable parallel agent execution to solve
token context overflow by running each agent in a separate
tmux session with full 200K token budget.")

Bash(git commit -m "feat: Add distributed messaging and report protocols

Protocol Specifications:

1. Distributed Messaging Protocol \(distributed-messaging.md\):
   - Message format specification
   - Message types: task_assignment, status_update, findings_report
   - Required fields: message_id, timestamp, from, to
   - Task metadata: priority, dependencies, deadline
   - Status tracking: pending, in_progress, completed, blocked
   - Queue processing: pending → processing → completed

2. Report Format Protocol \(report-format.md\):
   - Standard report structure with YAML frontmatter
   - Required fields: report_id, generated, agent, task_id, status, overall
   - Findings section: category, severity, summary, details, evidence
   - Recommendations: priority, action, effort
   - Next steps with clear action items
   - Consistent formatting across all agents

Features:
- YAML-based for easy parsing
- Extensible for custom fields
- Supports message validation
- Enables report consolidation
- Audit trail for all communications

These protocols ensure consistent communication between
agents and enable automated report consolidation.")
